channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-05-26)

item.title: [SAVE BIG] [HOT] W.A. Production|Get 87% off Loop Engine 3 by W.A. Production for $14.90 (Normally $119).?NEW
[SAVE BIG] SampleHero|SampleHero is offering 86% off on Modern Percussion + Hybrid SFX library for Kontakt (full version). Use the code: SH_PercDeal_CRAZY.?NEW
